CH05.title: LG Air Conditioner CH05 Error
CH05.summary: Communication error between the indoor and outdoor units.
causes: Loose or disconnected signal wiring connections between units
Electromagnetic interference or improper grounding of communication lines
Defective indoor or outdoor Main Printed Circuit Board (PCB) modules
checks: Inspect the structural integrity and continuity of the 3-core communication line
Verify appropriate supply voltage and grounding continuity across terminal blocks
Check diagnostic LED status indicators directly on the outdoor inverter PCB
repairs: Re-termination or full replacement of damaged communication interconnecting cabling
Replacement of the faulty outdoor or indoor Main control PCB motherboard assembly

faq.q: Can I continue to run the fan when CH05 appears?
faq.a: No, the system automatically triggers a total safety shutdown loop to prevent potential electrical or compressor hardware damage.

CH01.title: LG Air Conditioner CH01 Error
CH01.summary: Indoor unit room temperature thermistor open or short circuit fault.
causes: Faulty or disconnected room ambient air temperature sensor assembly
Corroded pins or bad terminal solder connections on the indoor PCB sensor socket
checks: Measure the resistance profile of the thermistor using a digital multimeter against target specs (typically 10kΩ at 25°C)
Verify the sensor plug is securely plugged into the indoor board housing assembly
repairs: Replacement of the room air ambient temperature sensor thermistor assembly

faq.q: Why is my AC running for only 2 minutes then throwing CH01?
faq.a: The control board samples real-time data; upon seeing out-of-spec open or short parameters, it terminates system cycles immediately.

E1.title: Samsung Air Conditioner E1 Error
E1.summary: Indoor unit room temperature sensor operation failure.
causes: Defective internal room ambient temperature reading thermistor
Circuit break or physical disconnection on the indoor control motherboard sensor rail
checks: Evaluate the sensor physical positioning and continuous wiring circuit connection
Test resistance readings across the thermistor terminals at ambient temperatures
repairs: Replacement assembly installation for the dedicated room sensor unit

faq.q: Are E1 and 21 error metrics identical?
faq.a: On selective modern multi-split Samsung iterations, a 21 or E1-21 screen flash signals a related room-side intake circuit fault.

E4.title: Samsung Air Conditioner E4 Error
E4.summary: Outdoor unit thermal discharge or compressor high temperature protection cycle activation.
causes: Refrigerant leak resulting in an under-charged system causing overheating
Severely blocked or dirty outdoor condenser coil fins hindering heat rejection
Defective outdoor condenser fan motor or failed run capacitor assembly
checks: Evaluate operating system pressures with a manifold gauge set to check charge level
Inspect the outdoor unit environment for air blockages and clean dust/debris accumulation from coils
Check fan motor winding resistance parameters and functional state of the motor capacitor
repairs: Leak detection, system evacuation, line repairs, and precision R410a/R32 refrigerant recharge
Replacement of the failed outdoor condenser fan motor or capacitor structural blocks

faq.q: Will leaving the system off for an hour clear the E4 code?
faq.a: It may allow the compressor thermal switch to cool and reset, but the code will return if the root cause (leak or block) is not remediated.
